message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker with recent fix and review activity

Captures local beads issue-tracker state (41 entries added) accumulated during
the recent run of fix commits (dropbox capability split, openai endpoint
pinning, grafana base_url policy, fcp-streaming timeout rearm, supply-chain
digest validation, etc.).

Breakdown of additions:
- 29 entries marking issues closed (most carry close_reason notes referencing
  the corresponding fix commits and rch-mediated verification artifacts)
- 10 entries opening new issues for follow-on review work surfaced during
  the same audit pass
- 2 entries reflecting metadata edits on previously-tracked issues

This is purely a tracking-database snapshot — no source-code, manifest, or
test changes accompany it. Committed separately from Cargo.lock so the
dependency graph sync stays an isolated, easily-revertable change and the
beads activity has its own audit trail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
